changes: Add severity for collisions. If severity is high, speed loss will be much stronger and bump movement will be constrained at the wall direction.
Reworked vehicle collision handling with shared physics for single race and multiplayer.
Improved bump behavior with mass-weighted speed transfer and better lateral response.
Fixed multiplayer room and request feedback behavior for cleaner announcements.
serverChanges: Added the ability to override server architecture used by the update.
Applied shared collision resolution for humans and bots in all race pairings.
Updated race bump packets and protocol compatibility for the collision update.
Adjusted room-created notifications so players already in a room are not interrupted.
